快3双单小大计划群【网：59FC·CC】【网：95FC·CC】【QQ：5075273】【网：35FC·CC】<浏览器手动输入网址>【首单返利50%】【来富彩，马上发】【富彩祝您】【鸿运当头好运来】【财源滚滚为您开】【精彩纷呈乐不停】【大奖小奖进家门】JINYUAN666《金源导师》<br>原文翻译及赏析_作者李白<br>青天有月来几时？我今停杯一问之。<br>人攀明月不可得，月行却与人相随。<br>皎如飞镜临丹阙，绿烟灭尽清辉发。<br>但见宵从海上来，宁知晓向云间没。<br>白兔捣药秋复春，嫦娥孤栖与谁邻？<br>今人不见古时月，今月曾经照古人。<br>古人今人若流水，共看明月皆如此。<br>唯愿当歌对酒时，月光长照金樽里。<br>[![66.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/SsTM0tXD/66.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/hzmjTs1d)<br>[![67.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/C1kx7PGg/67.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/CBM0L4rP)<br>[![68.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/NM6QmycS/68.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/r0p6LwzN)<br>[![82.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/4NNXHNSg/82.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/z3Ms95Nt)<br>[![83.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/DwRhNQy8/83.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/K17CkMT2)<br>[![84.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/1XWhrwj1/84.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/dZTxqkF5)<br>------------------<br>vk.com/topic-239142224_64331802<br>vk.com/topic-239183351_65991840<br>vk.com/topic-239079470_65393046<br>vk.com/topic-239149369_65116383<br>vk.com/topic-239100477_65774637<br>vk.com/topic-239149335_64246353<br>vk.com/topic-239142258_64835402<br>vk.com/topic-239061271_65991842<br>vk.com/topic-239183378_64835404<br>vk.com/topic-239183293_64501270<br>vk.com/topic-239183258_64835403<br>vk.com/topic-239153681_65991845<br>vk.com/topic-239149174_64331808<br>vk.com/topic-239181080_65393049<br>vk.com/topic-239109878_64835405<br>vk.com/topic-239095546_64657274<br>vk.com/topic-239149223_64501271<br>vk.com/topic-239153786_64657272<br>vk.com/topic-239066396_64657276<br>vk.com/topic-239149036_64657273<br>vk.com/topic-239149227_65774640<br>vk.com/topic-239183222_64943257<br>vk.com/topic-239061404_64331810<br>vk.com/topic-239183318_64835407<br>vk.com/topic-239153896_64657277<br>vk.com/topic-239149361_65991844<br>vk.com/topic-239100522_64943256<br>vk.com/topic-239149267_65774642<br>vk.com/topic-239095537_65774643<br>vk.com/topic-239066480_65393053<br>vk.com/topic-239173868_64835409<br>vk.com/topic-239142184_64331811<br>vk.com/topic-239183459_65116391<br>vk.com/top
